data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts user data to protect privacy and ensure data security.
data.technical_spec: Uses AES-256 encryption standard or similar for data protection.

data.title: OAuth 2.0 Authentication
data.description: Secures user authentication processes with robust authorization protocols.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes OAuth 2.0 for user authentication and third-party app access.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security testing to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages in penetration testing and vulnerability assessments.

data.title: Application Layer Protection
data.description: Employs measures to protect against common web application vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Implements WAFs to safeguard against SQL injection, XSS, etc.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring multiple verification methods.
data.technical_spec: Offers Two-Factor Authentication for an additional layer of security.
